text: Spotify keeps recommending the same songs again and again. Discover Weekly used to be amazing, now it just replays stuff I already know.
I want new music but I don't want to waste time skipping bad songs. Every recommendation feels like a gamble.
The algorithm thinks I only like one genre. I'm into so much more but it just keeps me boxed into lo-fi forever.
App crashes every time I open Discover Weekly on my Samsung. Can't even see my recommendations.
Give me calm songs after a long day, but the chill playlists never match my actual mood. It throws hype tracks when I want to wind down.
FREE FOLLOWERS!!! click here >>> spotifyboost dot com get 10000 plays now!!!
Honestly Discover Weekly feels dead now. It used to introduce me to underground artists before they blew up, now it's the same safe mainstream picks every single week. I miss finding hidden gems.
I basically just listen to my own saved playlists at this point. It's easier than fighting the algorithm. I don't trust it to find me anything good anymore.
Why is there no easy way to tell Spotify what I want today? Some days I want to explore, some days I want comfort songs. I wish I could just steer it.
I want to find songs like the one playing but not literally the same five tracks on repeat. Radio just loops the same artists.
Feature request: please add a 'reset my taste' button. I feel trapped in my old listening habits and there's no way to escape the bubble Spotify built around me.
It would help so much if recommendations explained WHY a song was picked. Right now I have no idea why I'm getting these suggestions, so I don't trust them.
My playlists feel stale. The same songs sit there for months. I wish they evolved on their own so there was always something a little new.
spotify pls i just want music my friends are actually listening to, the discover stuff feels so random and disconnected from whats trending
necesito canciones para el gimnasio pero spotify siempre me pone lo mismo, no descubro nada nuevo para entrenar
